title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.110 - Assessment blanks, books and supplies, furnished, when
text:
137.110.  Assessment blanks, books and supplies, furnished, when. — The state tax commission shall design the necessary assessment blanks, which design shall be furnished to the assessor at least one hundred twenty days prior to January first of each year.  The assessor shall purchase assessment blanks, assessment books, and all necessary supplies relating to the assessment process at the expense of the county assessment fund.
(RSMo 1939 § 10950, A.L. 1945 p. 1782 §§ 10, 28, A.L. 1959 H.B. 108, A.L. 1983 S.B. 63, et al.) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9756; 1919 § 12766; 1909 § 11348
